questions.prompt: In AP Research, which concept is most central to the unit "Research Question"?

standardRefs: AP CED: Research Question
College Board AP Course and Exam Description
questions.prompt: A student reviewing Research Question needs to show the skill "use evidence accurately." Which action best fits that skill?
questions.correctText: Use evidence to explain disciplinary reasoning.
choices: describing a topic without explaining why it matters
Guess from key words about evidence-based explanation.
memorizing an isolated fact without evidence
Use evidence to explain disciplinary reasoning.
questions.explanation: The useful move is to connect evidence to disciplinary reasoning; this matches the standards/CED emphasis on reasoning and application.

ignoring the source or data in the prompt
making a claim without supporting evidence
questions.explanation: Most missed review questions come from using familiar terms without matching them to the exact context.
